      congr
      ext x
      have h₃ : x / 2 + 3 = (x + 6) / 2 := by
        ring
      rw [h₃]
    rw [h₂]
    -- Perform the substitution u = (x + 6)/2
    have h₃ : ∫ x in a..b, sin ((x + 6) / 2) = 2 * (cos ((a + 6) / 2) - cos ((b + 6) / 2)) := by
      -- Use the fundamental theorem of calculus
      have h₄ : ∫ x in a..b, sin ((x + 6) / 2) = 2 * (cos ((a + 6) / 2) - cos ((b + 6) / 2)) := by
        -- Use the substitution u = (x + 6)/2
        have h₅ : ∫ x in a..b, sin ((x + 6) / 2) = 2 * (cos ((a + 6) / 2) - cos ((b + 6) / 2)) := by
          rw [intervalIntegral.integral_comp_add_right (fun x => sin (x / 2))]
          <;> simp [sin_add, cos_add, mul_comm]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> field_simp
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> norm_num
          <;>
          simp_all [cos_add, sin_add, mul_comm]
          <;>
          ring_nf
          <;>
          norm_num
          <;>
          linarith
        exact h₅
      exact h₄
    rw [h₃]
    -- Simplify the expression using trigonometric identities
    have h₄ : 2 * (cos ((a + 6) / 2) - cos ((b + 6) / 2)) = 2 * cos (a / 2 + 3) - 2 * cos (b / 2 + 3) := by
      have h₅ : cos ((a + 6) / 2) = cos (a / 2 + 3) := by
        have h₅₁ : (a + 6) / 2 = a / 2 + 3 := by ring
        rw [h₅₁]
      have h₆ : cos ((b + 6) / 2) = cos (b / 2 + 3) := by
        have h₆₁ : (b + 6) / 2 = b / 2 + 3 := by ring
        rw [h₆₁]
      rw [h₅, h₆]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> simp [cos_add, sin_add]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> norm_num
      <;> linarith
    rw [h₄]
  exact h₁
